pageDescription: Customize the appearance of wave backgrounds, aurora glow, particles, and blur effects across the site.
waveCountDesc: Number of layered waves rendered behind the page header.
waveSpeedDesc: How quickly the waves glide across the background.
waveThicknessDesc: Controls the stroke thickness of each wave layer.
paletteDesc: Choose a preset palette or define your own custom colors.
customColorDesc: Used as the gradient endpoints for every wave when the 'Custom' palette is selected.
auroraIntensityDesc: Strength of the soft aurora glow layered over the waves.
blurAmountDesc: Blur applied to the wave gradients. 0 keeps them crisp.
particlesDesc: Toggle the small floating particles drifting across the header.

externalServices.heading: External services
externalServices.description: Configure the third-party services used to fetch assets across the site.

ipfsGateway.help: Gateway used to resolve IPFS links for NFT images and other content. Use a public gateway you trust.
